comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Tripwires Review**: Missing LBYL check - should verify `prompt_path.exists()` before calling `.read_text()`. Even for bundled resources, erk follows LBYL pattern. See `src/erk/core/release_notes.py` for the standard pattern: check existence before reading.

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Added LBYL exists() check before read_text() in _load_prompt, with FileNotFoundError if missing. Fixed in a5e7e6cb8.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-24 18:43 PST_

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Python Review**: Inline import should be at module level - move `import tempfile` to the top of the file with other imports

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Moved import tempfile to module level. Fixed in a5e7e6cb8.

comments.author: github-actions
comments.body: **Dignified Python**: Missing encoding parameter - should be `write_text(..., encoding="utf-8")` to ensure consistent UTF-8 handling across platforms

comments.author: schrockn
comments.body:
Added encoding="utf-8" to write_text(). Fixed in a5e7e6cb8.

_Addressed via `/erk:pr-address` at 2026-02-24 18:43 PST_
